channel.title: Agent-Framework on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Agent-Framework on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: From Local to Production: The Complete Developer Journey for Building, Composing, and Deploying AI Agents
item.description:
Microsoft announces v1.0 of Microsoft Agent Framework and general availability of the Foundry Toolkit for Visual Studio Code. The post frames these releases as part of a workflow for building, composing, and deploying AI agents from local development to production.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog

item.title: ai: What’s new in Microsoft Foundry | February 2026
item.description:
February 2026 updates add new/updated foundation models (Claude 4.6, GPT Realtime/Audio 1.5, Grok 4.0 GA), advance the Microsoft Agent Framework to Release Candidate, and move Foundry REST API v1 to GA.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
